meaning: vt.制作,构成,捏造,伪造,虚构
examples: It angers me that people would fabricate a story like that.
David, on the other hand, had labored to fabricate a curious patent leather trouser suit.
Their advancements have been about how to design and fabricate that intricate structure cheaply.
More troubling is the ability to fabricate fake signals that are indistinguishable from real ones.
At James' garage bikes are built from the ground up and can take 800 hours to fabricate.
